example_summary: The first enantioselective total synthesis of (–)-denticulatin A by W. Oppolzer featured a key aldol reaction for enantiotopic group differentiation in a meso dialdehyde. The reaction utilized a bornanesultam chiral auxiliary to form a (Z)-borylenolate, which reacted with the dialdehyde to give the product in high yield and enantiopurity.

extracts.transformation_text: An enantioselective aldol reaction between an N-propionylbornane-10,2-sultam and a meso dialdehyde to form a hemiacetal product.
reactants_text: meso dialdehyde with TIPS protecting group
extracts.conditions_text: i. Et2BOTf, i-Pr2NEt, DCM, -78 °C; ii. addition of meso dialdehyde
